## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include screenshots or short screen recordings if helpful.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Ckourse version: [from Settings page or release tag]
- Install method: [installer, built from source]

## Logs

Paste any relevant error output or console logs here.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help diagnose the issue.
